|----------------|----------------|

## Chief Complaint

Fever, weakness and body ache.

## Diagnosis

Viral Fever

## Prescription

1. Paracetamol 650mg - 1-1-1 for 5 days
2. Vitamin C 500mg - once daily
3. ORS Solution - as needed

## Investigations

CBC, Dengue NS1
